# On the Nature of the Gods

*Cicero · 45 BCE*

A dialogue in which Cicero stages an Epicurean, a Stoic, and an Academic debating the existence and nature of the gods. Book II unfolds the Stoic theology of a rational [providence](../glossary/providence.md) [immanent](../glossary/immanence.md) in the world.
